task_completion.description: Create required layers with specific colors.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The LibreCAD layer list panel shows 'ISLAND' (Green), 'ROADWAY' (White), and 'CENTERLINES' (Cyan).

task_completion.description: Draw the central island on the ISLAND layer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A green circle is visible in the center of the drawing area.

task_completion.description: Draw the outer roadway and four approach legs on the ROADWAY layer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: White lines forming four approach legs (extending North, South, East, West) and an outer circle are visible in the drawing area.

task_completion.description: Trim the intersection and fillet the corners.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The intersection forms a continuous outer boundary with no overlapping inner lines (trimmed), and the corners where the straight legs meet the outer circle are smoothly rounded (filleted).

task_completion.description: Save the design as roundabout_design.dxf in the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The LibreCAD window title bar shows 'roundabout_design.dxf', or a file manager/terminal shows the file saved in /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/.

integrity.description: The agent used the LibreCAD GUI to create the design.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the LibreCAD application open with drawing tools being actively used, rather than a terminal or script editor generating the file.

integrity.description: The LibreCAD command line history reflects genuine drawing actions.
integrity.visual_evidence: The command line area at the bottom of the LibreCAD window shows CAD commands like 'circle', 'line', 'trim', 'fillet', or coordinate inputs.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the CAD software by writing raw DXF text.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no screenshots of a text editor (like nano, vim, or gedit) open with raw DXF code.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Center: (100, 100). Central island: radius 4 on 'ISLAND' layer (Green). Outer roadway: radius 12 on 'ROADWAY' layer (White). Approach legs: 4 legs (N, S, E, W), 8 units wide on 'ROADWAY' layer. Fillets: radius 6 at corners. Centerlines on 'CENTERLINES' layer (Cyan). Expected output file: /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/roundabout_design.dxf.
